title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Toucan seen flying around Sin City has been rescued
items.description: A toucan seen flying around the Las Vegas desert has been captured by a bird rescue group

items.title: Most Americans see Iran as an enemy but doubt Trump's judgment on military force, AP-NORC poll finds

items.title: Memorial services for Jesse Jackson begin at Chicago HQ of his civil rights group
items.description: Memorial services for the Rev. Jesse Jackson Sr. begin in Chicago and stretch across the country to honor his long civil rights legacy

items.title: DHS official promises immigration agents won't be at polling places during midterms
items.description: A DHS official is promising top state election administrators that immigration agents will not be at polling places during November's midterm election
